name: sandbox_lab
description: Multi-objective Bayesian optimization for autonomous experimentation. Uses the BoTorch stack for constrained batch suggestion, Pareto extraction, and a built-in solder reflow optimization benchmark.
self_test: python -c "from plugins.prometheus.sandbox_lab.wrapper import PLUGIN; import asyncio; r=asyncio.run(PLUGIN.invoke({'mode':'self_test'})); assert r.get('valid')"

mode.description: Operation mode: 'suggest' proposes next experiments, 'optimize' runs a full BO loop on an internal synthetic objective, 'pareto' extracts the Pareto front from observations, 'self_test' runs built-in solder reflow demo.

parameters.description: Parameter definitions with name, [low, high] bounds, and optional type (continuous or integer).

objectives.description: Objective definitions with name and optimization direction.

constraints.description: Hard constraints on the parameter space.

observations.description: Existing experimental observations (in-memory). Mutually exclusive with observations_path.

observations_path.description: Absolute path to a CSV of historical experiments (e.g. test_docs/manufacturing/sandbox_observations.csv). Use instead of `observations` for large tables. Parameter columns and objective columns must be identifiable via either `parameter_columns` + `objective_columns` OR inferred from the `parameters[*].name` + `objectives[*].name` blocks. Fails loudly on missing file, missing columns, NaNs.

parameter_columns.description: Explicit list of CSV column names to treat as the input vector X when loading observations_path. Optional if `parameters` is supplied — names there are used instead.

objective_columns.description: Explicit list of CSV column names to treat as the objective vector Y when loading observations_path. Optional if `objectives` is supplied — names there are used instead.

batch_size.description: Number of experiments to suggest per batch (default 4).

n_iterations.description: Number of BO iterations for optimize mode (default 20).

acquisition.description: Acquisition function: qnehvi for 2-3 objectives, qnparego for 4+, auto selects automatically.

suggestions.description: Next suggested experiments as list of {param_name: value} dicts.

pareto_X.description: Parameter values corresponding to Pareto-optimal points.

optimization_trace.description: Per-iteration trace of the optimization loop.

best_observed.description: Best observed point(s) and their objective values.
